chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-646 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 24.10.2022 Applicant present in person. Respondents No.8 & 9 present in person. Mr. Fayaz Hussain Sabki, APG along with SIP Niaz Hussain SHO PS Serhari Ghulam and SIP Niaz Ali Lashari PS Bhiria City. ----- Alleged detainee has been produced by her husband. She has a meeting with her parents. She submits that she wants to live with her husband. Accordingly, in view of above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
